title: mentha arvensis var. hillebrandtii
intro: Mentha arvensis var. hillebrandtii, also known as Japanese mint or American wild mint, is a subspecies of the peppermint plant, native to North America. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to relieve digestive issues, nausea, and headaches due to its high concentration of menthol and menthone compounds. The health benefits of Mentha arvensis var. hillebrandtii include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may help to reduce stress and improve overall well-being. The plant can be prepared into various herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and essential oils, which can be used to treat a range of health issues and promote relaxation.
